descriptions.capture: First to capture the set number of stones wins.
descriptions.speed: You have {{seconds}} seconds per move; time resets when you play in time. Each overrun gives your opponent 1 point.
descriptions.base: Set komi after seeing base stone placement, then play with your chosen color—tests positional reading.
descriptions.hidden: Turn the game with hidden moves! Hidden and scan items demand mind games and reading.
descriptions.missile: Move your stones with missile items to create new variations.
descriptions.uniform: All stones look the same color—memory is key.
descriptions.castle: Use randomly placed castles to secure territory; capturing one stone can win.
descriptions.chess: Chess pieces meet Go: move a piece, then place a stone to finish your turn.
descriptions.mix: A match combining two or more special rules.

descriptions.ttamok: Win by making five in a row or capturing the required opponent stones.
descriptions.alkkagi: Flick stones to knock your opponent's off the board.
descriptions.curling: Slide stones toward the house on a Go board; closest stones score.

ISTJ.playStyle: Faithful to joseki and fundamentals, pursuing solid territory. Strong in endgame.

ISFJ.playStyle: Focuses on stable territory and blocking attacks. Careful, cautious style.

INFJ.playStyle: Plans long-term strategy and reads opponent intent well.

INTJ.playStyle: Systematic strategy with logical reading. Commits to chosen plans.

ISTP.playStyle: Finds the best move for the situation. Practical and flexible.

ISFP.playStyle: Relies on intuition and plays freely. Sometimes unexpected moves.

INFP.playStyle: Pursues ideal Go with creative moves. Emotional judgment.

INTP.playStyle: Analyzes moves through theory and logic. Enjoys complex sequences.

ESTP.playStyle: Attacks actively and enjoys fighting. Bold, improvisational moves.

ESFP.playStyle: Prefers lively, intuitive moves. Leads the game improvisationally.

ENFP.playStyle: Plays creative moves passionately. Unpredictable style.

ENTP.playStyle: Prefers challenging, logical attacks. Enjoys creative, unusual moves.

ESTJ.playStyle: Pursues territory systematically and faithfully follows basics.

ESFJ.playStyle: Prefers stable, cooperative moves. Builds territory carefully.

ENFJ.playStyle: Understands opponents and inspires with big-picture moves.

ENTJ.playStyle: Sets clear strategy and pushes decisively. Leadership style.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Use
termsOfService.intro: {{serviceName}} Thank you for using our service. These terms and conditions establish the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between members and the company.

sections.title: purpose
paragraphs: The purpose of these Terms and Conditions is to stipulate the rights, obligations and responsibilities of the Company and its members in relation to the use of {{serviceName}} and related services (hereinafter “Services”) provided by {{companyName}} (hereinafter “Company”).

sections.title: Definition of Terms
bullets: “Service” means all multiplayer Go and additional features provided by the Company.
“Member” refers to a person who agrees to these Terms and Conditions and enters into a service use agreement with the Company.
“Account” means the email or social login information registered by the member for member identification and service use.
“Paid content” refers to all digital goods, items, and services provided for a fee, such as diamonds, gold, and VIP membership.

sections.title: Posting and revision of terms and conditions
paragraphs: The Company posts the contents of these Terms and Conditions on the service initial screen and footer area so that members can easily check them.

The company may revise these terms and conditions to the extent that they do not violate relevant laws, and when revising, the date of application and reason will be specified and announced 7 days prior to the date of application. However, in case of revisions that are unfavorable to members, notice will be given 30 days in advance.

sections.title: Establishment of service agreement
paragraphs: The service agreement is established when the member agrees to these Terms and Conditions and the Privacy Policy and completes the service subscription process.
If a child under the age of 14 applies for membership, he or she must obtain the consent of his or her legal representative.

sections.title: Provision and change of services
bullets: Access to Go matches and game modes
RPG features such as character growth, equipment, and inventory
Community functions such as rankings, tournaments, and guilds
Sales of paid content (Diamond, VIP membership, etc.)
All services additionally developed by other companies or provided through partnerships

sections.title: Paid payments and refunds
paragraphs: Members can purchase paid content using the payment method determined by the company.
Cancellation and refund of purchased paid content are subject to separate “cancellation and refund regulations.”

sections.title: Member Obligations
bullets: Obligation to comply with these Terms and Conditions, related laws and operating policies announced by the Company
Obligation not to steal another person’s name or payment information
Obligation not to interfere with the operation of the service or use it in an abnormal manner
Obligation not to engage in profanity, spam, obscenity, discrimination, or criminal behavior in in-game chats or bulletin boards, etc.
Obligation not to access, reverse engineer, copy, or distribute clients and data provided by the company without permission.

sections.title: Company Obligations
paragraphs: The company makes reasonable technical and managerial efforts to provide stable services.
The company manages members' personal information in accordance with its personal information processing policy to protect it.

sections.title: Restrictions on service use
paragraphs: If a member violates the obligations of these Terms and Conditions or interferes with the normal operation of the service, the company may take measures such as warning, restriction of use, or permanent account suspension.
If abnormal payments, goods transactions, hacks, macros, account theft, real name theft, etc. are confirmed, use may be restricted immediately without prior notice.

sections.title: Contract termination and withdrawal
paragraphs: Members may request withdrawal of membership at any time according to the procedures provided by the company, and the company will immediately process it in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.
When you withdraw, all paid and free goods and items you own will be lost and will not be restored even when you re-enroll.

sections.title: Disclaimer
bullets: The company is not responsible for service interruption due to reasons beyond the company's control, such as natural disasters, war, or communication failures.
We are not responsible for any disruption in service use due to reasons attributable to members.
The company has no obligation to intervene in disputes that arise between members or between members and third parties through the service.

sections.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: Disputes regarding these Terms and Conditions shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea.
Lawsuits regarding disputes arising from the use of the service shall be filed in the court of competent jurisdiction stipulated in the Civil Procedure Act.

sections.title: Contact us
paragraphs: For inquiries regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact Customer Center ({{phone}}) or email ({{email}}).

privacyPolicy.title: privacy policy
privacyPolicy.intro: {{companyName}} establishes and discloses this policy to protect members' personal information in accordance with relevant laws and regulations such as the Personal Information Protection Act, and to promptly and smoothly handle complaints related to this.

sections.title: Personal information items collected
paragraphs: {{companyName}} (hereinafter referred to as “Company”) collects the following minimum personal information to provide {{serviceName}} service.
bullets: When signing up: email address, password (encrypted storage), nickname
When social logging in: Identifier and email provided by authentication provider (Google, Kakao, etc.)
Automatically collected during service use: access IP, device information, browser information, cookies, game play records
When paying for a fee: Payment method, approval number, purchase history (sensitive payment information such as card number is stored by the PG company, but not by the company)
When making customer inquiries: email address, information included in the inquiry

sections.title: Purpose of collection and use of personal information
bullets: Member identification and identity verification, stay logged in
Game service provision, operation, and management
Paid product payment/settlement/refund processing
Prevent illegal use, hacks, macros, account theft and resolve disputes
Delivery of mandatory information such as notices and changes to terms and conditions
Service quality improvement and statistical analysis (in a form that does not result in personally identifiable information)

sections.title: Retention and use period of personal information
paragraphs: In principle, the information is destroyed without delay when membership is withdrawn or the purpose of collection and use is achieved. However, if preservation is necessary in accordance with relevant laws and regulations, it will be kept for the period below.
bullets: Records of contracts or subscription cancellations: 5 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Records of payment and supply of goods, etc.: 5 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Records of handling consumer complaints or disputes: 3 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Website visit records (logs): 3 months (Communication Secrets Protection Act)

sections.title: Provision of personal information to third parties
paragraphs: The company does not use or provide members' personal information to outside parties beyond the scope specified in this policy. However, the following cases are exceptions.
bullets: If the member consents in advance
If there are special provisions in the law or a request is made pursuant to legal procedures by an investigative agency.

sections.title: Entrustment of personal information processing
paragraphs: The company may entrust the processing of personal information as follows for service operation, and upon entrustment, supervises to ensure safe management in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.
bullets: Railway (service hosting/infrastructure operation)
Payment agency (PG company): Payletter — Card payment/regular payment approval and settlement
Google AdSense: Ad delivery and traffic analysis
Google·Kakao: Social login authentication

sections.title: Rights of members and legal representatives and how to exercise them
bullets: Members may request to view, modify, delete, or suspend processing of their personal information at any time.
You can request to exercise your rights through My Page within the service or by emailing the customer center, and the company will take action without delay.
The rights to personal information of children under the age of 14 can be exercised by their legal representative.

sections.title: Procedures and methods for destroying personal information
bullets: Electronic file format: Permanently deleted using technical methods that cannot be recovered or reproduced
Paper document format: shredded or incinerated
Personal information for which there is a reason for destruction is destroyed immediately or without delay after the expiration of the retention period.

sections.title: Measures to ensure the safety of personal information
bullets: Password one-way hash encrypted storage
Communication section SSL/TLS encryption
Minimize access rights and keep access records
Periodic security checks and vulnerability patches

sections.title: Use of cookies and advertising identifiers
paragraphs: The company may use cookies and advertising identifiers to provide convenience in using services and to send advertisements.
Members can refuse to store cookies through their browser settings, but in this case, use of some services may be restricted.
The Company obtains additional consent from EU users through the Consent Management Platform (CMP) of its advertising partners, such as Google AdSense.

sections.title: Personal information protection officer
paragraphs: The company is responsible for overall handling of personal information, and has designated a personal information protection manager as follows to handle member complaints and provide relief for damage.
bullets: Personal Information Protection Manager: {{representative}}
Contact: {{phone}}
Email: {{email}}

sections.title: How to relieve rights infringement
paragraphs: If you need relief or consultation for damage caused by personal information infringement, you may contact the organizations below.
bullets: Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee: 1833-6972 (privacy.go.kr)
Personal Information Infringement Reporting Center: 118 (privacy.kisa.or.kr)
Supreme Prosecutors' Office Cyber ​​Investigation Division: 1301 (spo.go.kr)
National Police Agency Cyber ​​Investigation Bureau: 182 (ecrm.cyber.go.kr)

sections.title: Change in Policy
paragraphs: This personal information processing policy may be changed in accordance with laws and company policies, and when changes are made, the effective date and changes will be announced on this page.

refundPolicy.title: Cancellation/refund policy
refundPolicy.intro: We would like to inform you about cancellation and refund of paid content. These regulations have been written in accordance with relevant laws and regulations, such as the Electronic Commerce Act.

sections.title: Effect of subscription withdrawal
paragraphs: In accordance with the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, etc. (hereinafter referred to as the “Electronic Commerce Act”), members may cancel their subscription within 7 days from the date of payment or availability of paid content.
The cancellation of subscription will take effect when the notice of intention to withdraw subscription reaches the company.

sections.title: When cancellation of subscription is restricted
paragraphs: In the following cases, a member's right to withdraw subscription may be restricted.
bullets: If the member has already used or consumed paid content (diamonds, gold, VIP membership, etc.) after payment
If the benefit is provided to the member as it takes effect immediately after payment (e.g., immediate application to VIP membership)
If the content is lost or damaged due to the member's fault
When resale is difficult due to passage of time
If you use a season/period limited package or receive part of it by mail, it is only available for the remaining amount.

sections.title: Refund Procedure
paragraphs: If you wish to receive a refund, please apply by following the procedures below.
bullets: 1. Send refund application to customer service center email ({{email}})
2. Required information: account email, payment date, payment method, payment amount, reason for refund
3. After confirmation from the company, we will reply within 3 business days as to whether a refund is possible.
4. When a refund is decided, the refund will be processed within 3-5 business days for each payment method.

sections.title: Refund method by payment method
bullets: Credit card: Immediately notify the card company by canceling the payment (depending on the card company policy, it takes 3 to 7 business days to deposit money)
Account transfer: Send refund to the account designated by the member
Simple payment (Kakao Pay, etc.): Refund to the source of payment method (card/account)
Regular payment (subscription): No additional payments will be made if canceled before the next payment due date.

sections.title: Information on cancellation of regular payment (VIP membership)
paragraphs: Regular payment products such as VIP membership are automatically renewed every payment cycle unless the member directly cancels the subscription.
bullets: You can cancel at any time through My Page within the service or the “Subscription Management” menu in the store.
If cancellation is difficult, request a customer service center email ({{email}}) or phone ({{phone}})
Cancellation requests must be completed at least 24 hours prior to the next payment date to avoid being charged the next payment.
Even after cancellation, VIP benefits will remain for the period already paid.

sections.title: Minor payment protection
paragraphs: If a minor under the age of 19 makes a payment without the consent of his or her legal representative, he or his legal representative may request cancellation of the payment.
Proof, such as a family relationship certificate, may be requested to verify identity and confirm payment by a minor.

sections.title: Payment dispute handling
paragraphs: Disputes related to payment and refunds that arise between the company and members are resolved first through mutual consultation.
If agreement is not reached, you can apply for dispute mediation with the Fair Trade Commission or the Korea Consumer Agency.
bullets: Korea Consumer Agency: 1372 (kca.go.kr)
Fair Trade Commission: 1670-0007 (ftc.go.kr)
Electronic Commerce Dispute Mediation Committee: (ecmc.or.kr)

paragraphs: For refund and payment-related inquiries, please contact the customer service center below. We strive to respond within 24 hours on business days.
bullets: Email: {{email}}
Phone: {{phone}}
Company Name: {{companyName}} (Representative {{representative}})
